# buyphone.lk

## Identity
buyphone.lk is Sri Lanka's premier online destination for 100% genuine smartphones, tablets, and tech accessories. We are an authorized retailer based in Colombo.

## Core Guarantees
- 100% Genuine Products (Factory Sealed)
- Official Manufacturer Warranty (Minimum 1 Year)
- Free Islandwide Delivery across Sri Lanka (24 hours within Colombo)
- 7-Day Easy Returns policy

## Brands Carried
We offer the latest authentic devices from top global brands including:
- Apple
- Samsung
- Xiaomi
- OnePlus

## Payment Options
We support secure online card payments, bank transfers, Cash on Delivery (COD), as well as KOKO and MintPay for 3-month interest-free installments.

## Contact & Location
- Location: Colombo, Sri Lanka
- Website: https://buyphone.lk
